email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Administrative Back Office Assistant bij Forum Jobs. Uw oproep voor een nauwkeurige, zelfstandige medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto verwerk ik klantorders, beheer ik content in WordPress en ondersteun ik de planning. Daarvoor werkte ik bij Katoen Natie in een logistieke omgeving, waar ik accuraat en gestructureerd werkte onder tijdsdruk. Ik ben bekend met MS Office en heb ervaring met CRM-systemen en ERP-achtige tools. Mijn Engelse taalvaardigheid is professioneel, en ik spreek Nederlands op B1-niveau (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Ik werk graag samen met collega's en klanten, ben flexibel en leergierig. Ik hoop mijn administratieve vaardigheden en gestructureerde aanpak bij Forum Jobs in te zetten.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Administrative Back Office Assistant position at Forum Jobs. Your call for an accurate, independent worker fits my experience perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I process customer orders, manage content in WordPress, and support planning. Previously, I worked at Katoen Natie in a logistics environment, where I worked accurately and structured under time pressure. I am familiar with MS Office and have experience with CRM systems and ERP-like tools. My English language skills are professional, and I speak Dutch at B1 level (I am taking classes to improve).

I enjoy working with colleagues and customers, am flexible and eager to learn. I hope to contribute my administrative skills and structured approach at Forum Jobs.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Administrative Back Office Assistant bij Forum Jobs. Uw oproep voor een nauwkeurige, zelfstandige en gestructureerde medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het verwerken van klantorders, het opstellen van orderbevestigingen en het ondersteunen van de planning. Ik werk dagelijks met MS Office en beheer content in WordPress. Daarnaast heb ik bij Katoen Natie in een logistieke omgeving gewerkt, waar ik leerde accuraat en efficiënt te werken onder tijdsdruk. Deze ervaringen hebben mij een gestructureerde werkhouding en oog voor detail bijgebracht.

U vraagt om een goede beheersing van het Engels; ik spreek en schrijf Engels op professioneel niveau. Mijn Nederlands is B1, en ik volg actief lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik ben flexibel, klantgericht en werk graag samen met collega's. Nieuwe tools en systemen pik ik snel op.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn administratieve en organisatorische vaardigheden in te zetten voor Forum Jobs. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Administrative Back Office Assistant position at Forum Jobs. Your call for an accurate, independent, and structured worker fits my experience and skills perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for processing customer orders, preparing order confirmations, and supporting planning. I work daily with MS Office and manage content in WordPress. Additionally, I worked at Katoen Natie in a logistics environment, where I learned to work accurately and efficiently under time pressure. These experiences have given me a structured work attitude and attention to detail.

You require a good command of English; I speak and write English at a professional level. My Dutch is B1, and I am actively taking lessons to improve further. I am flexible, customer-oriented, and enjoy working with colleagues. I quickly pick up new tools and systems.

I am motivated to contribute my administrative and organizational skills to Forum Jobs. I hope to explain my motivation further in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Processed customer orders and prepared order confirmations at Episto, supporting planning and daily operations.
Worked accurately and efficiently in a high-volume logistics environment at Katoen Natie.
Proficient in MS Office; experienced with CRM systems and ERP-like tools.
Professional English (spoken and written); Dutch B1 and actively improving.
Flexible, structured, and customer-oriented with strong communication skills.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I process customer orders, prepare order confirmations, support planning, and maintain client websites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data and technical audits. Comfortable with MS Office, content management, and administrative tasks; quick to pick up new tools. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Administrative & Office: order processing, order confirmation, planning support, customer database management, general administrative tasks
- MS Office: Word, Excel, Outlook
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Communication & Customer: excellent communication skills, customer-oriented, flexible, team player
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Process incoming customer orders and prepare order confirmations
- Support the planning department with daily operations
- Maintain contact with customers regarding planning and deliveries
- Manage and maintain the customer database
- Perform general administrative tasks
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
